---
id: get-nova-transaction-history-for-a-wallet
title: "Get NOVA transaction history for a wallet"
description: "Queries Horizon first; falls back to PostgreSQL if Horizon is unavailable."
sidebar_label: "Get NOVA transaction history for a wallet"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/novarewards-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get NOVA transaction history for a wallet"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/transactions/{walletAddress}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Queries Horizon first; falls back to PostgreSQL if Horizon is unavailable.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
